description: Detects function-like #define macros that could be inline functions for better type safety. Simplified from Rust: flags all preproc_function_def nodes without checking for token pasting (##), stringification (#), variadic (__VA_ARGS__), do-while wrappers, or control flow (return/break/continue/goto). Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Function-like macro detected -- consider using an inline function for better type safety, debuggability, and compiler optimization. Macros with token pasting (##), stringification (#), variadic args, or do-while wrappers cannot be replaced.
